examples: I did have rather spindly legs.
At least the clothing covered his spindly body for now.
It was spindly looking with a tall skinny stalk and only one head on it.
Its white spindly arms that sprout succulent fruit line the main road around the island.
On he capers, knock-kneed, curly-shoed, spindly-legged in awful black tights, like something out of the Beano!
